- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_authorize.Handler).RunRegoTest` — RunRegoTest — see iamv1.InternalAuthorizeServiceServer.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_authorize.Handler).WriteTuples` — WriteTuples — see iamv1.InternalAuthorizeServiceServer.
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_authorize.operationToProto` — operationToProto конвертирует corelib operations.Operation в protobuf Operation.
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_authorize.protoTuplesToInternal` — protoTuplesToInternal конвертирует protobuf-tuple'ы в client-уровневые ConditionalTuple, включая опциональную condition-ссылку.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_authorize.structToMap` — structToMap конвертирует protobuf Struct в нативную Go-map; nil даёт nil.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.Handler).Check` — Check — single-tuple authorization gate (KAC-127 bug #15).
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service.AuthorizeService).CheckRelation` — CheckRelation — relation-native authorization check (FGA Check + OPA overlay).
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service.splitFGAObject` — splitFGAObject — split an FGA object string "<type>:<id>" into its parts.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.Handler).ListPermissions` — ListPermissions — заглушка до E3 (OpenFGA Check).
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.Handler).LookupSubject` — LookupSubject обрабатывает gRPC InternalIAMService.LookupSubject — резолвит subject по external_id / id / email.
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.LookupSubjectUseCase).Execute` — Execute резолвит subject по одному из oneof-ключей.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.LookupSubjectUseCase).byEmail` — byEmail резолвит subject по e-mail — ищет User mirror; отсутствие даёт NotFound.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.Repository).Reader` — Reader открывает read-only TX на slave (если есть) или master.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.readTx).Users` — Users — User Reader-порт поверх этой read-транзакции.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.userReader).GetByEmail` — GetByEmail — legacy lookup (KAC-105).
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.userWriter).GetByEmail` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.writeTx).Users` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.responseUser` — responseUser упаковывает domain.User в LookupSubjectResponse с oneof-веткой User.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.LookupSubjectUseCase).byExternalID` — byExternalID резолвит subject по Zitadel external_id (`sub` claim) — ищет User mirror; отсутствие даёт NotFound.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.userReader).GetByExternalID` — GetByExternalID — legacy lookup (KAC-105 / E0).
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.userWriter).GetByExternalID` — (undocumented — see C4)
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.LookupSubjectUseCase).byID` — byID резолвит subject по локальному kacho-id — User (`usr…`) либо ServiceAccount (`sva…`) в зависимости от префикса.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.readTx).ServiceAccounts` — ServiceAccounts — ServiceAccount Reader-порт поверх этой read-транзакции.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.saReader).Get` — Get возвращает ServiceAccount по id; отсутствие строки → ErrNotFound с текстом "ServiceAccount <id> not found".
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.saWriter).Get` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.userReader).Get` — Get возвращает User по id; отсутствие строки → ErrNotFound с текстом "User <id> not found".
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.userWriter).Get` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.writeTx).ServiceAccounts` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/internal_iam.responseServiceAccount` — responseServiceAccount упаковывает domain.ServiceAccount в LookupSubjectResponse с oneof-веткой ServiceAccount.
